text.value: 3atabah.com

Graduate Development Programs 
برامج تطوير الخريجين
يمكنك البحث باسم الجهة، أو اسم البرنامج أو التخصص
3atabah.com

Cooperative Training Programs 
برامج التدريب التعاوني
يمكنك البحث باسم الجهة أو التخصص
3atabah.com
الأسئلة الشائعة
كيف يتم تحديث البرامج في عتبة؟
يتم تحديث البرامج يدويًا عبر زيارة الروابط بشكل شبه أسبوعي للتأكد من أن التقديم لا يزال متاح
ماهي برامج تطوير الخريجين التي يستهدفها موقع عتبة؟

يوجد العديد من برامج التدريب والتطوير لمختلف الخبرات والشهادات العلمية، ولكن عتبة يستهدف برامج تطوير الخريجين من المرحلة الجامعية (بكالوريوس أو أعلى)، ويستهدف البرامج التي تقدم بعض المزايا التي ينالها الموظف بدوام كامل في تلك الجهة، مثل: التسجيل في التأمينات، تأمين طبي، إجازات، إلخ
ما الفرق بين برامج تطوير الخريجين و "تمهير"؟

في عام ٢٠٢٤م، تم تغيير مسمى برنامج تمهير من "برامج التدريب على رأس العمل" إلى "برامج تطوير الخريجين"، ولذلك نتج اللبس بين برامج تطوير الخريجين المقدمة من الجهات وبين برامج تطوير الخريجين (تمهير) التي يقدمها صندوق الموارد البشرية. برامج تمهير هي مقدمة من صندوق الموارد البشرية (هدف) بالتعاون مع مختلف الجهات، وتكون عادة لمدة ٣-٦ أشهر، وتصرف مكافأة شهرية للمتدرب بمبلغ ٣٠٠٠ ريال سعودي، بالإضافة إلى تقديم شهادة خبرة بعد الانتهاء من التدريب. برامج تمهير لا تنتهي بالتوظيف ولا تشمل مميزات الموظف المعتادة، مثل التسجيل في التأمينات، تأمين طبي، إجازات، إلخ. موقع عتبة لا يعرض فرص تمهير، والتقديم على برامج تمهير يكون عن طريق موقع صندوق الموارد البشرية (هدف)
لماذا تم إلغاء نظام التنبيهات بالبريد الإلكتروني؟

يعتمد نظام التنبيهات على العديد من الخدمات لأتمتة إرسال التنبيهات في حال تحديث حالة التقديم لأي من البرامج. وهذه الخدمات تكلف الكثير من الوقت والمال. بالإضافة إلى أن أعداد المشتركين ليست بالقليلة، وهذا يتطلب منا ترقية باقات الاشتراك لدى خدمات الإيميل والأتمتة بعد كل مدة لتستوعب المشتركين الجدد (لأن من النادر أن يلغي الشخص اشتراكه). ومع ذلك فالنظام الحالي لا يوصل التنبيهات لأكثر من ٤٠٠-٨٠٠ شخص، مع أن المشتركين في القائمة بالآلاف. ولذلك ارتأينا أن نلغي نظام التنبيهات في الوقت الحالي، وسيتم دراسة أنظمة أخرى بإذن الله، والتي قد تكون أكثر فعالية (قناة تيليغرام مثلًا)
لاحظت رابط تقديم مريب، كيف بإمكاني إبلاغ فريق عَتبة؟

نحرص في عَتبة أشد الحرص على عرض فرص موثوقة مع التأكد من مصادرها، ومع حرصنا، فإننا لا نستطيع ضمان ألا يكون أحد الروابط لطرف مشبوه غرضه جمع البيانات فقط لا غير
إن واجهك أي رابط شككت في مصداقيته، لا تتردد في إبلاغ فريق عَتبة عبر البريد لإعادة النظر فيه، واحرص دائمًا على التحقق من مصدر الرابط قبل إرسالك أي بيانات شخصية
هل أستطيع إرسال سيرتي الذاتية إلى فريق عتبة؟
أرجوك لا :) عتبة ليس لها علاقة بأي من الجهات المذكورة في الموقع
كيف أعرف إن كانت سيرتي الذاتية مناسبة للتقديم على الوظائف؟
نعمل على دليل شامل يوضح أهم الخطوات اللازمة لبناء سيرة ذاتية مناسبة لسوق العمل السعودي، وسيتم إطلاقه قريبًا بإذن الله تعالى. في الوقت الحالي يمكنك الاستعانة بأشهر الأمثلة والنماذج على الانترنت
للاقتراحات والتعديلات، الرجاء التواصل عن طريق البريد الالكتروني
For suggestions and modifications
contact@3atabah.com
ملاحظة: هذا الايميل للاقتراحات فقط، ولا علاقة له بأي جهة توظيف. فلذلك يرجى عدم إرسال السيرة الذاتية أو أي طلبات للتوظيف
Note: this email address is for suggestions only. Please don't send your CV or job inquiries
3atabah.com
عن الموقع

موقع عتبة هو جهد شخصي لجمع أكبر قدر ممكن من برامج تطوير الخريجين وبرامج التدريب التعاوني في مكان واحد؛ ليسهل على الباحث أن يعرف ماهي البرامج المتاحة في سوق العمل في المملكة العربية السعودية

بسبب أن الموقع لا يتبع أي جهة رسمية، فيصعب متابعة جميع البرامج وتحديث الروابط والمعلومات المتعلقة بها، فلذلك ينصح دائماً بالتأكد من الموقع الخاص بجهة التوظيف لمعرفة آخر التحديثات

نرحب دائماً بأي اقتراحات لتحسين الموقع، ونرجو من الله أن يستمر في العمل خلال الأعوام القادمة بإذن الله
عن برامج تطوير الخريجين

برامج تطوير الخريجين هي برامج تقدمها الشركات والجهات الحكومية لحديثي التخرج من أجل تأهيلهم للعمل لدى تلك الجهة بعد الانتهاء من البرنامج

تتراوح مدة التدريب من عدة أشهر إلى سنتين على حسب البرنامج وجهة التوظيف، وبالغالب يعامل المتدرب كموظف بدوام كامل لدى الجهة الموظفة، فيتلقى العديد من المميزات التي يتلقاها الموظف الرسمي لدى تلك الجهة

بعض برامج تطوير الخريجين تضمن التوظيف بمجرد التخرج من البرنامج، بينما البعض الآخر لا يضمن التوظيف، ولكن يحسن من فرصة الحصول على وظيفة لدى الجهة بعد انتهاء مدة التدريب بنجاح وإثبات القدرة والالتزام
عن برامج التدريب التعاوني

برامج التدريب التعاوني هي برامج يقدمها القطاع العام والخاص لطلاب الجامعات من أجل تأهيلهم وتدريبهم في سوق العمل. وهي مقرر إلزامي في معظم الجامعات السعودية، ومدته ١٦ أسبوعًا متواصلة

برامج التدريب التعاوني بالغالب لا تنتهي بالتوظيف، ولكن تحسن من فرصة الحصول على وظيفة لدى الجهة بعد انتهاء مدة التدريب بنجاح وإثبات القدرة والالتزام

ملاحظة: التواريخ المذكورة أعلاه هي تواريخ تقريبية تستند إلى مواعيد التسجيل من الأعوام الماضية. وقد تتغير من عام لآخر، ولكن تم ذكرها لكي يتسنى للمتقدم التحضير مسبقًا (مثل أخذ اختبارات اللغة الانجليزية، أو تجهيز المستندات، أو غيرها)

About the job
About BSF:

Banque Saudi Fransi (BSF) is a leading financial institution built on a bold vision, to merge Saudi leadership with international standards, from day one, we have gone beyond conventional banking empowering ambition, enabling growth, and shaping lasting legacies.
Apply and Be part of a dynamic team that empowers progress for individuals, businesses, and society.

BSF Values: 

We are BSF - Always putting the needs of our people, customers, shareholders and society ahead of our own personal agenda. We are a community that we defend and protect, always.
True to ourselves, always - We are honest with one another, even at the risk of temporary disharmony.It is never personal.
Us before me - We put ideas before ego and leverage the expertise of others.
Keep it simple - We strive to make everything we do as simple as possible. We set our people up for success and then get out of their way.We only need to be asked one.We own it.
Winning is fun - We seek to be number one in the hearts and minds of our people, customers and shareholders.We have limitless ambition and the drive to win.
Think big, act quick - We think long-term in our decisions, but we make them quickly and have a bias towards action

Location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

Job Description:
Our COOP program offers senior college students the opportunity to explore BSF and learn more about what we do on a daily basis
The diversity in our business functions and culture will help you grow your personal and professional network and develop fundamental, career-building skills

Who do we seek?
We seek students from many disciplines including Engineering, Business, Computer Science and IT, Finance and Accounting and more

Qualifications & Experience:
Currently enrolled as a senior undergraduate student (not yet graduated)
A minimum GPA of 2.5/4 or 3.5/5
COOP Request Letter issued by your university
Copy of your latest transcript
Copy of latest CV
The applicant must have completed all required courses in their specialization

Knowledge & Skills:
Teamwork
Excellent communication skills in English and Arabic
Proficient in using Microsoft Office products

Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today

About the job
🌐 Join Jeel as a Business Development & Sales Intern / Junior Business Development Support (Co-op Training)/ Tamheer 
📍 Location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
🏢 Department: Business Development
👤 Reporting To: Business Development Team
🕒 Type: Onsite | Co-op / Internship Opportunity

Want to kick-start your career in business development within a leading digital organization?
Jeel, a fast-growing digital IT company and a wholly owned subsidiary of Riyad Bank, is looking for a driven and detail-oriented Business Development Intern to support our Business Development team.
This (Co-op training / Tamheer opportunity) offers hands-on exposure to real commercial operations, partnerships, and sales enablement in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
If you’re organized, eager to learn, and excited to work closely with business leaders — this opportunity is for you.

🚀 What You’ll Do
📊 Support CRM (HubSpot) updates, including uploading and managing 350+ contacts
📈 Prepare weekly sales pipeline and performance reports
🤝 Support weekly partnership reporting and tracking
🧩 Maintain Jira updates and ensure pipeline hygiene
🗂 Provide general administrative and operational support to the BizDev team
📝 Take meeting notes and document discussions, actions, and partnership updates
⚙ Assist with ad-hoc tasks related to business development operations

🎯 What We’re Looking For
🎓 Co-op students or fresh graduates in Business Administration, Management, Marketing, or related fields
🧠 Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
📊 Comfortable using Excel / Google Sheets and digital tools
💼 Interest in business development, sales operations, or partnerships
🗣 Good communication skills in English (Arabic is a plus)
🏢 Ability to work onsite in Riyadh

🌟 Why Jeel?
✨ Gain real-world exposure within a digital company backed by Riyad Bank
🚀 Work in a fast-growing environment with meaningful business impact
🤝 Collaborate with experienced professionals across business and technology
📚 Structured learning, mentorship, and hands-on Co-op training
📈 Build a strong foundation for a future career in business development or commercial roles

data.column7:
وصف الوظيفة

برنامج ميدان هو خدمة مجتمعية تقدمها هيئة الحكومة الرقمية للطلاب والطالبات في المرحلة الجامعية الذين تشمل خطتهم الدراسية مشاركتهم في برامج تدريب تعاوني، وتسعى الهيئة من خلال هذا البرنامج إلى تمكين الطلاب والطالبات من تطبيق المعارف المكتسبة في الفصول الدراسية بميدان العمل واكتساب المهارات التي يتطلبها سوق العمل.

المهارات

أن يكون المتقدم سعودي الجنسية
أن يكون المتقدم طالب/طالبة في المرحلة الجامعية في إحدى المؤسسات التعليمية المعتمدة من وزارة التعليم.
أن لا يقل المعدل التراكمي عن (3.5 من 5) أو (2.8 من 4) أو ما يعادلها.
أن يكون التخصص الدراسي من ضمن التخصصات المطلوبة.
اشتراط الجامعة التدريب العملي (التعاوني) كمتطلب للتخرج.
أن لا تقل مدة برنامج التدريب التعاوني عن شهرين ولا تزيد عن ستة أشهر.

تقدّم التأمينات الاجتماعية (GOSI) فرصة فريدة للشباب والشابات الطموحين عبر برنامج التدريب التعاوني، المصمم لربط المعرفة الأكاديمية بالخبرة العملية، والمساهمة في إعداد كفاءات وطنية قادرة على مواكبة تطورات سوق العمل.
يقدم البرنامج تجربة متكاملة تهدف إلى تطوير المهارات الشخصية والمهنية، وتتجاوز حدود التعلم النظري، وتسهم في تعزيز روح الإبداع والابتكار في بيئة عمل احترافية وداعمة.
لماذا تختار التدريب التعاوني في GOSI؟
خبرة ميدانية قيّمة مع نخبة من الخبراء والمتخصصين في مجالات متعددة.
جلسات تدريبية متنوعة تنمّي مهاراتك المهنية والشخصية.
فرص لبناء شبكة علاقات مهنية قوية تدعم مسيرتك المستقبلية.
 
متطلبات التقديم
أن يكون المتقدم من طلاب إحدى الجامعات المعترف بها.
سعودي/سعودية الجنسية.
معدل أكاديمي لا يقل عن (4 من 5) أو ما يعادله (3.2 من 4).
إجادة اللغة الإنجليزية بمستوى متقدم.
التفرغ التام طوال فترة التدريب.
اجتياز المقابلة الشخصية بنجاح.
توفر خطاب رسمي من الجامعة معتمد لطلب التدريب التعاوني.
 
ماذا نقدم؟
نؤمن بأن تجربة التدريب الناجحة تتجاوز حدود المعرفة، لذا نقدم لك:
بيئة عمل محفزة تدعم التعلم المستمر والنمو المهني.
إشراف مباشر من خبراء GOSI لضمان تطوير مهاراتك وصقل قدراتك المهنية.
 
انضم إلى GOSI، وابدأ رحلتك نحو مستقبل مهني واعد.

IT Infrastructure Intern

About Mozn

Mozn is a rapidly growing technology firm revolutionizing the field of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia and it’s working to realize Vision 2030 with a proven track record of excellence in supporting and growing the tech ecosystem in Saudi Arabia and the GCC region. Mozn is the trusted AI technology partner for some of the largest government organizations, as well as many large corporations and startups.

 

We are in an exciting stage of scaling the company to provide AI-powered products and solutions both locally and globally that ensure the growth and prosperity of our digital humanity. It is an exciting time to work in the field of AI to create a long-lasting impact.

About the role

We are looking for an IT infrastructure Intern who will be participating in all infrastructure administration activities. The intern will work on monitoring, conducting preventive and corrective maintenance activities, and implementing changes on the environment.



What you'll do

    Monitor and administration of enterprise network (access points, switches, routers, perimiter firewalls and VPNs) 
    Monitor on-prem data center and communication rooms
    Provide basic support for on-prem servers. physical and virtual
    Perform NAC administration
    IAM and access provisioning for infrastructure components and VPN clients, in addition to periodic reviews
    Perform Storage and Backup systems administration
    Respond to support tickets related to troubleshooting end-users and peripherals connectivity issues and conduct RCA
    Perform patch management activities for on-prem infrastructure components as well as endpoints
    Perform asset management for infrastructure components and conduct periodic health checks


Qualifications

    Full understanding of enterprise network TCP/IP and OSI model
    Basic knowledge of Linux and Windows Server
    Basic knowledge about virtualization and containerization
    BSc degree in related major, or final year student (if university allows)
    Professional certifications will be preferred
    Positive attitude and passion for learning and innovation


Benefits

    You will be at the forefront of an exciting time for the Middle East, joining an incredibly exciting technology company in the region.
    You will be given a lot of responsibility and trust. We believe that the best results come when the people responsible for a function are given the freedom to do what they think is best.
    You will enjoy flexible working conditions and a generous compensation package that is aligned with individual and company performance

About the job
INSPIRE | EXHILARATE | DELIGHT

For over six decades, Chalhoub Group has been a partner and creator of luxury experiences in the Middle East. The Group, in its endeavour to excel as a hybrid retailer, has reinforced its distribution and marketing services with a portfolio of eight owned brands and over 300 international brands in the luxury, beauty, fashion, and art de vivre categories. More recently, the Group expanded its expertise into new categories of luxury watches, jewellery, and eyewear.

Every step at Chalhoub Group is taken with the customer at heart. Be it constantly reinventing itself or focusing on innovation to provide luxury experiences at over 750+ experiential retail stores, online and through mobile apps, each touch point leads to delighting the customer.

Today, Chalhoub Group stands for 14,000 skilled and talented professionals across seven countries, whose cohesive efforts have resulted in the Group being ranked third in the Middle East and first in Saudi Arabia as a Great Place to Work®.

To keep the innovation journey going, the Group has set up “The Greenhouse”, which is not just an innovation hub, but also an incubator space and accelerator for start-ups and small businesses in the region and internationally. This is just one of the several initiatives taken by the Group to reinvent itself, catalysed by forward thinking and future-proofing. The Group has also been embedding sustainability at the core of its business strategy with a clear commitment towards people, partners and the planet, and by being a member of the United Nations Global Compact Community and signatory of the Women's Empowerment Principles.

What You'll Be Doing

By being part of our journey here at Chalhoub Group, you can make a real impact on customers and some of the finest brands in the world. In return, you’ll have everything you need to innovate your career.

We are always looking for ambitious students from a wide range of backgrounds for our professional internship programs. You will up-skill in the everyday and experience working as a valued member of the team - you will be empowered to innovate, develop and learn in a fun and supportive environment!

What You’ll Need To Succeed

  Eligibility: You must be a senior student seeking training to fulfill the university’s mandatory requirements for graduation.
 Language Skills: Intermediate to Advanced English proficiency.
 Technical Skills: Basic Excel knowledge.
 Location: Riyadh

What We Can Offer You

With us, you will turn your aspirations into reality. We will help shape your journey through enriching experiences, learning and development opportunities and exposure to different assignments within your role or through internal mobility. Our Group offers diverse career paths for those who are extraordinary, every day.

We recognise the value that you bring, and we strive to provide a competitive benefits package which includes health care, child education contribution, remote and flexible working policies as well as exclusive employee discounts.

We Invite All Applicants to Apply

It Takes Diversity Of Thought, Culture, Background, Differing Abilities and Perspectives to truly Inspire, Exhilarate and Delight our customers. At Chalhoub Group, we are committed to inclusion and diversity.

We welcome all applicants to apply and be part of our exciting future. We ensure equal opportunity for all our applicants without regard to gender, age, race, religion, national origin or disability status.

data.column7:
تُولي مستشفى الملك خالد التخصصي للعيون ومركز الأبحاث اهتماماً كبيراً بتنمية قدرات كوادرها البشرية، باعتبارها محوراً أساسياً لبناء المهارات وتعزيز الأداء. وتسعى إدارة التعليم والتطوير إلى التميز في تقديم برامج تدريبية فعّالة، تُسهم في تطوير وتحسين معارف ومهارات الموظفين من خلال تدريب عالي الجودة وفرص تطوير مهني متكاملة، بما يدعم رؤية المستشفى وتوجهاته الاستراتيجية. وتُصمّم البرامج التدريبية وفق خطة مدروسة لتقييم احتياجات التدريب، مع التركيز على ترسيخ ثقافة التعلم المستمر ومواكبة التطورات المهنية، باستخدام مفاهيم تدريب مبتكرة وأحدث التقنيات.
برامج إدارة التعليم والتطوير

تُقدّم إدارة التعليم والتطوير مجموعة متنوعة من البرامج التدريبية والمهنية، تشمل:

• التعليم المستمر: توفير فرص تعلم مستدامة تواكب التطورات العلمية.

• برامج تعليم التمريض الإكلينيكي: تعزيز مهارات التمريض وتطويرها وفق أحدث المعايير العالمية.

• برامج تقنيات طب العيون: تدريب متخصص لتدريب الكوادر النقنية في مجالات طب العيون.

• تطوير المهارات: تحسين المهارات السلوكية والفنية للموظفين بما يتناسب مع احتياجات العمل..

• تطوير القيادات: تأهيل وتطوير القيادات المستقبلية وتعزيز مهارات التخطيط الاستراتيجي واتخاذ القرارات.

• مركز الإنعاش القلبي الرئوي: تدريب معتمد على تقنيات الإنعاش القلبي الرئوي الأساسية والمتقدمة.

• تقنيات الحاسب الآلي: تطوير المهارات التقنية في الحاسب الآلي لتلبية متطلبات العمل الحديثة.

• تعليم اللغات: تعزيز مهارات الاتصال الفعّال في بيئة متعددة اللغات والثقافات.

• البرامج المنتهية بالتوظيف: تدريب الكفاءات الوطنية من خلال برامج تدريب متخصصة.

• التدريب التعاوني: إتاحة فرص تدريبية لطلاب الجامعات في المجالات الصحية والإدارية والتقنية.

The Ministry of Economy and Planning is pleased to announce the opening of applications for the Cooperative Training Program for the second semester of 2024.

Job Description

When you join us as an intern, we help you become the best you can be. Prepare to expand your repertoire and learn about successful consulting from day one. As an integral part of our professional team of consultants you will be actively involved in the projects for our clients. With the guidance from your personal mentor you will constantly develop, as well as learn about life as a consultant.

We’re offering Bachelor's & Master's students a one-of-a-kind opportunity to dive into the world of consulting.

With minimum 12 weeks internship duration, you’ll become an essential part of a dynamic consulting team, working on real client projects and gaining valuable hands-on experience. You’ll get a true feel for our culture and whether Roland Berger is the right fit for you.
Standout performers will have the chance to secure a full-time role.



Qualifications

    Excellent academic record
    Relevant practical and international experience
    Strong analytical and creative problem solving skills
    Entrepreneurial spirit and a winning personality
    Fluency in English and Arabic

Additional Information

Please apply online by submitting your cover letter and CV. Please indicate whether you are looking for an internship position in your cover letter. 

Are you a next-generation thinker bursting with new ideas? Then, we would love to hear from you! If you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact us.

Job Description 

We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic student intern to join our Sales team. This internship will provide hands-on experience in the pharmaceutical sector and an opportunity to learn from experienced professionals in a collaborative environment. The successful candidate will assist with various tasks and projects, gaining insights into real-world applications of their academic knowledge.

Who we are?

For more than a century in the pharmaceutical industry, our company has been inventing for life, bringing forward medicines and vaccines for many of the world's most challenging diseases. Today, our company continues to be at the forefront of research to deliver innovative health solutions and advance the prevention and treatment of diseases that threaten people and animals around the world.

Responsibilities

    Assist with daily operational tasks and projects as assigned by the supervisor/buddy.
    Conduct research and analysis to support ongoing projects.
    Prepare reports, presentations, and documentation.
    Participate in team meetings and contribute ideas for improving processes.
    Collaborate with team members on assignments and projects.
    Shadow experienced staff to learn about their roles and workplace dynamics.
    Support the team with administrative tasks as needed.

Qualifications

    Currently enrolled in a relevant degree program.
    Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
    Proficiency in [specific software or tools relevant to the role, if applicable].
    Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
    Eagerness to learn and take on new challenges.
    [Optional Previous internship or work experience is a plus, but not required.]

Duration 

The internship will last 4 to 5 weeks.

data.column7:
Cooperative Training Program – The Saudi Tourism Investment Company (ASFAR)

About The Company:
The Saudi Tourism Investment Company (ASFAR), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Public Investment Fund, aims to contribute to the development of tourism sector in Saudi Arabia. ASFAR will launch and advance hospitality, retail and tourism investment opportunities in promising tourist destinations to increase the attractiveness of cities and improve the quality of life for Saudi citizens. Moreover, ASFAR will collaborate with the private sector to establish and grow global projects that support Saudi Arabia’s position internationally as a leading tourism and cultural destination.

The Opportunity:
We are excited to announce the launch of the ASFAR COOP Internship Program for Second Semester 2024! This program offers a valuable opportunity for talented and ambitious students to gain hands-on experience and insights into our industry, working alongside experienced professionals in a dynamic environment.

Program Highlights:
Duration: Minimum 12 weeks.
Open to students currently enrolled in a COOP program at their university or college.
The applicant must have a cumulative GPA of at least "Very Good" (2.75 out of 4) or (3.75 out of 5).
Saudi National.
Strong in MS Excel, Word & PowerPoint.

Benefits of the Internship:
Hands-on experience
Mentorship from ASFAR professionals
Certificate of completion at the end of the program


We encourage all eligible students to apply and take advantage of this exciting opportunity to jumpstart your career!

Job Description

KAFD is offering COOP assignment opportunities for university and technical college students as part of its efforts to allow Saudi students to alternate between periods of academic study and full-time work placement as a preparation stage for their future careers.

The objective of this program is to provide students with the opportunity to enrich their experience with practical work situations, acquire new skills in their field of study, and meet graduation requirements.

The duration of the COOP assignment is seven months.

A copy of the national ID.

Teamworking and interpersonal skills.
The ability to learn quickly.
Analytical skills.
Problem-solving skills.
Committing to on-going professional and personal improvement.

About the job
Job Description

Become an integral part of our JPMorganChase team! Each day will be unique – bring a positive attitude, entrepreneurial spirit and get ready to roll up your sleeves. This position is an essential part of the team and will have exposure to several aspects of running a banking office.

The COOP Training Program runs in Riyadh office. The COOP training program starts with a joint induction program. These sessions will bring you up to speed on our history, the scale and scope of our organization today and our ambitious plans for tomorrow. Plus we’ll arm you with the technical and practical knowledge you’ll need to make your mark in our firm. Then, get ready to make a real impact on the industry or product group you join.

As a COOP trainee in JPMorganChase, you will be exposed to stimulating work and learn from experienced colleagues. On-the-job learning is only part of what we offer. You’ll also have your very own mentor and access to tutors to advise and support you through the program. Plus you’ll be invited to our speaker series and a host of other interesting events. You’ll be meeting colleagues, including senior leaders, from across the firm and building your professional network.

Job Responsibilities

Provides general administrative support on key departmental day-to-day tasks such as document management, team governance, data maintenance and reporting.
Participates in projects from starting point up to completion and provides support to tasks relating to process documentation, automation, and simplification.

Required Qualifications, Capabilities, And Skills

Excellent analytical, quantitative, and interpretative skills.
Strong verbal and written communication skills.
Fluency in English is a prerequisite.
The confidence and initiative to take on early responsibility and manage your own projects.
Proficiency in MS Word and Excel.

Eligibility

To be considered for a place on our COOP Training Program you must be a final year university student. A request letter from the university will be required post offer approval. 

We will be filling our classes on a rolling basis. We strongly encourage you to submit your application as early as possible before job postings close.

About Us

J.P. Morgan is a global leader in financial services, providing strategic advice and products to the world’s most prominent corporations, governments, wealthy individuals and institutional investors. Our first-class business in a first-class way approach to serving clients drives everything we do. We strive to build trusted, long-term partnerships to help our clients achieve their business objectives.

We recognize that our people are our strength and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. We are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. We also make reasonable accommodations for applicants’ and employees’ religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs. Visit our FAQs for more information about requesting an accommodation.

Samref, as part of its social responsibility, offers COOP training opportunities to a selected number of Saudi students from various universities and colleges to help them gain a practical work experience and satisfy their academic program graduation requirements.

Applying Student must be Saudi national.

For General Inquiries:
Please contact Coop.Program@samref.com.sa (No registration is allowed via this email).
 
Additional Information:
Coop Training will be within Samref Refinery located in Saudi Arabia, Yanbu

About Satel:
Satel specializes in managing and operating residential complexes and properties. We focus on enhancing tenant experiences, increasing property value, and providing high-quality services. As we continue to expand, we are looking for talented individuals to join our team and grow with us in various operational and commercial areas.

What You’ll Do:
As a Graduate Trainee, you will work across multiple departments and gain hands-on experience in several aspects of property management, operations, tenant relations, customer experience, marketing, and business development. The program will help you build the skills needed to succeed in the real estate industry by offering exposure to both internal and external projects:
Cross-Department Experience: The trainee will work in various departments as follows:
Operations: Work with the operations teams to ensure smooth workflow and efficiency in property maintenance and management.
Tenant Relations: Collaborate with tenant relations to learn how to handle inquiries and complaints from tenants of all nationalities to ensure their satisfaction.
Client Experience: You will have the opportunity to work on enhancing the client experience to ensure high-level service for tenants and customers.
Project Management: Work on internal and external projects contributing to Satel’s growth and success.
Digital Marketing: Assist in developing and executing marketing strategies aimed at promoting Satel’s services, with a focus on expanding our reach to foreign tenants and families.
Facility Management: Handle independent tasks in the operations department, such as coordinating maintenance, managing facility inspections, and ensuring quick responses to tenant requests.
Business Development: Contribute to business development efforts, exploring growth opportunities, and improving current processes.
Comprehensive Training: Receive guidance from experienced team members while working on ongoing projects, market research, and growth strategies.

Skills & Competencies Needed:
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Proactive attitude with a passion for learning and problem-solving
Ability to adapt and thrive in a fast-paced environment
Strong attention to detail and commitment to excellence
Excellent organizational and time-management skills
A genuine interest in property management and real estate

Program Details:
Duration: 4 months
Stipend: Competitive monthly stipend plus performance-based commissions
Benefits: Health insurance
Evaluation: Performance review at the end of the program to assess potential for full-time employment
Availability: Full-time

What We Offer:
Hands-on Experience: Full immersion in various departments and real estate projects
Mentorship: Guidance from experienced professionals to help you grow in your career
Career Growth: Opportunity for full-time employment based on performance and successful completion of the training program
Industry Exposure: Gain insight into all aspects of property management, tenant relations, business development, marketing, and customer experience.
Comprehensive Benefits: In addition to health insurance, our training program includes valuable opportunities for skill-building, networking with industry professionals, and a clear pathway for career development. As a trainee, you will be part of a company that values your professional growth and provides a supportive environment for learning and advancement.

Job Overview:
Tamra Capital is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Cybersecurity Intern to support its cybersecurity function. This role offers hands-on experience tackling real-world security challenges in a regulated fintech environment. The internship covers key areas like security governance, DevSecOps, access control, auditing, and regulatory compliance (SAMA CSF, NCA ECC, ISO 27001). It’s ideal for candidates wanting practical experience in a fast-paced, cloud-first organization and a strong foundation in cybersecurity operations and risk management.

Key Responsibilities
Assist in identifying and documenting cybersecurity risks across departments and systems
Help monitor and analyze access control issues, endpoint visibility, and cloud security configurations
Support the development and maintenance of cybersecurity policies, procedures, and internal/external audit evidence
Collaborate with IT and Technology teams to support onboarding/offboarding, IAM reviews, and license tracking
Participate in DevSecOps activities such as GitHub access audits, code control improvements, and staging security reviews
Conduct research on emerging threats, open-source tools, and compliance requirements
Plan and contribute to cybersecurity awareness campaigns (e.g., phishing simulations, MFA training)
Help maintain asset and SaaS inventories, access logs, and policy acknowledgment records
Support audit preparation through evidence collection, log sampling, and control mapping

Qualifications
Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, IT security, or a related field
Certifications such as (ISC)² CC, CompTIA Security+, Google Cybersecurity Certificate, ISO/IEC 27001 Foundation are a plus
Basic understanding of core cybersecurity concepts (CIA triad, IAM, MFA, logging, DevOps, SIEM)
Familiarity with tools like Google Cloud, GitHub, Bitdefender, SIEM, and Microsoft 365 Security is a plus
Strong documentation, analytical, and communication skills
Ability to collaborate with both technical and non-technical teams
Eagerness to learn, take initiative, and contribute under regulatory pressure
Interest or experience in audits, risk assessments, or policy enforcement is highly valued

If you’re ready to start your cybersecurity career in a fast-paced, security-focused environment, we’d love to hear from you. This is a great chance to gain practical experience and develop your skills.

[Cloud Platforms Engineer – Co-Op Program]

About us:
moneymoon is a Fintech startup that is set to revolutionize the lending landscape through our pioneering cutting-edge Fintech. We are dedicated to empowering individuals by providing a peer-to-peer short-term microfinance platform, where one person can directly support another for short-term microfinance needs. Through an innovative user experience, we facilitate connections between lenders and borrowers, creating an environment that is secure, transparent, and mutually beneficial.

Program Overview:
We are offering a unique Co-Op opportunity for 2025 for passionate and ambitious fresh graduates or final-year students specializing in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related fields. The selected candidate will receive hands-on training and mentorship in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), Kubernetes, and modern DevOps tools to support enterprise-grade cloud platforms.
What You Will Learn:
How to deploy and manage resources on Oracle Cloud (OCI).
Introduction to cloud networking (VCN, subnets, routing, security).
Building and managing Kubernetes clusters using Oracle Kubernetes Engine (OKE).
Basics of CI/CD pipelines and automation using GitLab CI or GitHub Actions.
Working with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
Real-world experience in monitoring, logging, and troubleshooting cloud infrastructure.
Understanding security and compliance requirements (e.g., SAMA standards).

Ideal Candidate Profile:
Fresh graduate or currently enrolled in the final year of a Bachelor's degree in IT, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
Strong interest in cloud computing and DevOps practices.
Basic knowledge of Linux, Docker, or any cloud platform is a plus.
Eager to learn, self-motivated, and open to mentorship.
Strong communication and problem-solving skills.
Available to commit to a 6-month Co-Op program.

[Product Operations and Onboarding Internship]

About the job:
Keeta is an independent brand of Meituan, the world's largest tech-driven retail company. We focus on food and consumer product delivery services in international markets with the mission: "We help people eat better, live better". Keeta launched in Hong Kong in 2023 and has already achieved full regional coverage. We are now expanding into the Saudi market, with plans for further global expansion.

The Opportunity:

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented intern to join our team and contribute to product function testing, process streamlining, project promotion, and market research. As an intern, you will gain hands-on experience by assisting in product testing, supporting the onboarding of merchants, and conducting valuable market research in the Saudi market. This is a great opportunity for those looking to develop skills in product management, project coordination, and market analysis within a dynamic environment.

Key Responsibilities:

Product Function Testing:
Assist in conducting product function testing from the customer’s perspective prior to the product launch.
Communicate with the front-line and product teams to identify issues and feedback from testing.
Help identify areas for improvement and contribute to product enhancements based on customer experience.

Product Process Streamlining & Onboarding Operations:
Support the streamlining of the product onboarding process for new merchants.
Assist with data entry and review of merchant information during the onboarding process.
Help ensure the onboarding process is efficient and well-organized.

Project Promotion & Team Support:
Participate in the day-to-day operations of the product team and support project execution.
Collaborate with the product development and R&D teams to implement ongoing projects.
Assist in developing tools and processes to support the sales team and ensure team objectives are achieved.

Market Research:
Conduct research on the operations of restaurants in the Saudi market.
Provide insights and recommendations based on research to help shape product offerings and business strategies.
Prepare and share research reports to support decision-making for product design.

Basic Requirements:
Fluent in both Arabic and English (spoken and written).
Proficient in using data analysis tools or reporting tools.
Available to work at least 5 days per week, with a minimum internship duration of 4 months.
Strong sense of responsibility, initiative, and ownership.
Excellent communication skills and attention to detail.
Ability to work independently as well as part of a collaborative team.

What We Offer:

Hands-on experience in product testing, project management, and market research.
Opportunities for professional growth and networking.
The opportunity to contribute to real-world projects in a growing market.
3 months of internship experience extendable.
A monthly Financial Reward.

Join us and be part of this dynamic community that is redefining the food delivery experience!

About the Company

Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East, making it easier than ever to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Careem is led by a powerful purpose to simplify and improve the lives of people and build an awesome organisation that inspires. Since 2012, Careem has created earnings for over 2.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of over 70 million customers, and built a platform for the region’s best talent to thrive and for entrepreneurs to scale their businesses. Careem operates in over 70 cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.

About The Team

You’ll be joining the People team at Careem—an energetic and collaborative group that supports our colleagues across the full employee journey. As an intern, you’ll play a key role in helping the team with daily People Operations tasks while gaining exposure to a wide range of HR activities. We work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and value those who are eager to learn, take initiative, and contribute to a positive and fun workplace culture. This is a great opportunity to explore how a People team operates at scale and make an impact as we continue to grow.

What You'll Do

Assist with daily People team needs and operations
Support colleagues with their queries on People-related matters
Take on new tasks and responsibilities as required, contributing to ongoing projects and initiatives
Assist in Talent Acquisition tasks 

What You'll Need

Saudi national
Results-driven and proactive mindset with awesome organizing skills
Proven ability to juggle multiple competing priorities and adjust with changing business needs
Strong communication skills in Arabic and English (written and spoken)
Coop training should be a graduation requirement by the university or college.
GPA of 3.5 and higher

What We’ll Provide You

We offer colleagues the opportunity to drive impact in the region while they learn and grow. As a full time Careem colleague, you will be able to:

Work and learn from great minds by joining a community of inspiring colleagues.
Put your passion to work in a purposeful organisation dedicated to creating impact in a region with a lot of untapped potential.
Explore new opportunities to learn and grow every day.
Work 4 days a week in office & 1 day from home, and remotely from any country in the world for 30 days a year with unlimited vacation days per year. (If you are in an individual contributor role in tech, you will have 2 office days a week and 3 to work from home.)
Access to healthcare benefits and fitness reimbursements for health activities including gym, health club, and training classes.

Work with Us. Change the World.
 
At AECOM, we're delivering a better world. Whether improving your commute, keeping the lights on, providing access to clean water, or transforming skylines, our work helps people and communities thrive. We are the world's trusted infrastructure consulting firm, partnering with clients to solve the world’s most complex challenges and build legacies for future generations.
 
There has never been a better time to be at AECOM. With accelerating infrastructure investment worldwide, our services are in great demand. We invite you to bring your bold ideas and big dreams and become part of a global team of over 50,000 planners, designers, engineers, scientists, digital innovators, program and construction managers and other professionals delivering projects that create a positive and tangible impact around the world.
 
We're one global team driven by our common purpose to deliver a better world. Join us.
 
Job Description
 
Work includes some of or all of the following: prepares or proofs correspondence, forms, spreadsheets, or documents, schedules meetings, makes travel arrangements, and/or maintains inventory of office supplies.
Familiar with a variety of the field's concepts, practices, and procedures.
Relies on experience and judgment to plan and accomplish more complicated goals.
Uses Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and other programs to accomplish work.

Qualifications
 
Additional Information
 
About AECOM
 
AECOM is the world’s trusted infrastructure consulting firm, delivering professional services throughout the project lifecycle – from advisory, planning, design and engineering to program and construction management. On projects spanning transportation, buildings, water, new energy and the environment, our public- and private-sector clients trust us to solve their most complex challenges. Our teams are driven by a common purpose to deliver a better world through our unrivaled technical and digital expertise, a culture of equity, diversity and inclusion, and a commitment to environmental, social and governance priorities. AECOM is a Fortune 500 firm and its Professional Services business had revenue of $14.4 billion in fiscal year 2023. See how we are delivering sustainable legacies for generations to come at aecom.com and @AECOM.
 
Freedom to Grow in a World of Opportunity
 
You will have the flexibility you need to do your best work with hybrid work options. Whether you’re working from an AECOM office, remote location or at a client site, you will be working in a dynamic environment where your integrity, entrepreneurial spirit and pioneering mindset are championed.
 
You will help us foster a safe and respectful workplace, where we invite everyone to bring their whole selves to work using their unique talents, backgrounds and expertise to create transformational outcomes for our clients.
 
AECOM provides a wide array of compensation, benefits and well-being programs to meet the diverse needs of our employees and their families. We’re the world’s trusted global infrastructure firm, and we’re in this together – your growth and success are ours too.
 
Join us, and you’ll get all the benefits of being a part of a global, publicly traded firm – access to industry-leading technology and thinking and transformational work with big impact and work flexibility. As an Equal Opportunity Employer, we believe in each person’s potential, and we’ll help you reach yours.
 
All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

About the job
Rize is a groundbreaking rent-now-pay-later platform reshaping the rental landscape in Saudi Arabia. We're dedicated to making rentals more accessible and affordable, enabling tenants to manage their finances with ease and landlords to secure their income effortlessly. We're on a mission to revolutionize the rental industry, breaking down barriers and creating opportunities for all. We're a team of innovators, thinkers, and problem-solvers, committed to creating a positive impact and driving change in the market.

Our Team 

We love working together, being creative, and doing things differently! Our team is made up of over 20 people with different nationalities. We work from a cozy office in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. And hey, we're not just smart—we're really good at coming up with new ideas! Plus, you can work from wherever you want because we like to keep things flexible.

Our core values & Principles

Innovation – We’re a technology-driven team with the purpose of uplifting the real estate sector. We are the leaders of the industry in innovation.
Customer Centricity – We put the customer at the core of every decision and action.
Adaptability - Being able to adapt quickly to changing market conditions and customer needs.
Empowerment & Collaboration – Our team is the most valuable aspect of the company; We respect all ideas, our team enjoys authority, autonomy, and collaboration.
Ethical Excellence - We perform within the highest ethical standard.

Job Summary

We're super excited to open the internship program in the data team to join our lovely team at Rize. Looking for a career in Data Science? Are you currently a university student in the data science and analytics field? Are you looking for practical training to level up your skills? Tailored for those with a passion for data analytics and modeling, this internship provides a comprehensive introduction to the science of data. Guided by seasoned leads.

What will you be doing?

Work with data: collect, clean, and analyze datasets
Write simple queries and scripts to support projects
Explore AI tools to enhance analysis and workflows
Collaborate with senior team members and learn best practices
Grow your technical and analytical skills in a hands-on environment

You're a perfect match if you have

Currently enrolled in a university or a recent graduate.
Basic knowledge of SQL and Python
Interest in AI and machine learning concepts
Strong logical and analytical thinking skills
Curiosity about data and a problem-solving mindset

Nice to have (but not required):

Exposure to AI tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ML libraries)
Familiarity with BI tools or simple dashboards

Benefits

What do we offer?

Competitive salary - Receive a competitive salary package in USD or SAR, reflecting your skills and contributions in our industry.
Diverse International team - Join a diverse international team where different perspectives and backgrounds enrich our collaborative culture.
Flexibility - Enjoy the option to work full remote or hybrid, allowing you to balance work and life in a way that suits you best.
Innovation - Shape the future of Proptech with your groundbreaking ideas and technological prowess.
Direct Impact - See your ideas come to life and make tangible changes in an industry ripe for revolution.
Fast-paced Learning - Grow personally and professionally every day with opportunities to master new skills in our dynamic start-up environment.
Creative Freedom - Take the reins, innovate, and push boundaries with the freedom to experiment, learn, and grow at Rize.
Close-knit Community - Join a collaborative, supportive team where your voice matters and your contributions are recognized and celebrated.

يساهم المتدرب في إدارة المواهب بشكل فعال في دعم وتطوير برامج التدريب والتطوير وإدارة المواهب داخل المنظمة. يكتسب خبرة عملية في تحديد الاحتياجات التدريبية، وتصميم وتنفيذ وتقييم البرامج التدريبية، بالإضافة إلى المشاركة في مبادرات إدارة الأداء وتطوير المسارات الوظيفية.
المهام والمسؤوليات:

تحديد الاحتياجات التدريبة:
المساعدة في جمع البيانات وتحليل الاحتياجات التدريبية على مستوى الأفراد والأقسام
المشاركة في إجراء استطلاعات الرأي والمقابلات لتحديد الفجوات في المهارات والمعرفة
دعم إعداد تقارير تلخص الاحتياجات التدريبية المقترحة

تصميم البرامج التدريبة:
المساعدة في تطوير محتوى الدورات التدريبية وورش العمل (عروض تقديمية، مواد مكتوبة، أنشطة تفاعلية)
البحث عن أفضل الممارسات والموارد التدريبية المتاحة.
التعاون مع الخبراء الداخليين والخارجيين لتطوير محتوى متخصص.

تنفيذ وتقييم البرامج التدريبة :
المساعدة في تنظيم وإعداد اللوجستيات الخاصة بالدورات التدريبية (حجز القاعات، إعداد المواد، التواصل مع المشاركين).
المشاركة في تقديم بعض أجزاء الدورات التدريبية وورش العمل تحت إشراف المختصين.
دعم استخدام المنصات والأدوات التدريبية المختلفة مثل أنظمة إدارة التعلم (LMS) .

تقييم أنشطة البرامج التدريبية:
جمع بيانات التقييم من المشاركين بعد الانتهاء من البرامج التدريبية.
المساعدة في تحليل نتائج التقييم وتقديم التوصيات لتحسين البرامج المستقبلية.
إعداد تقارير حول فعالية البرامج التدريبية وأثرها على أداء الموظفين.

دعم إدارة الأداء وتطوير المسار الوظيفي:
المساعدة في جمع وتوثيق بيانات تقييم الأداء وتحديد نقاط القوة والضعف لدى الموظفين.
المشاركة في تحليل نتائج تقييم الأداء لتحديد الاحتياجات التطويرية الفردية.
دعم تطوير خطط التطوير الفردية (IDPs) بالتعاون مع المديرين والموظفين.
المساعدة في إعداد مواد تتعلق بالمسارات الوظيفية فرص الترقية داخل المنظمة.

المساهمة في مبادرات إدارة المواهب الأخرى:

دعم مشاريع تتعلق بتحديد وتطوير الكفاءات الأساسية للمنظمة.
المساعدة في إعداد مواد التواصل الداخلي المتعلقة ببرامج التدريب والتطوير وإدارة المواهب.
المشاركة في فعاليات وأنشطة تهدف إلى تعزيز ثقافة التعلم والتطوير داخل المنظمة.

About the job
As the world's leader in digital payments technology, Visa's mission is to connect the world through the most creative, reliable and secure payment network - enabling individuals, businesses, and economies to thrive. Our advanced global processing network, VisaNet, provides secure and reliable payments around the world, and is capable of handling more than 65,000 transaction messages a second. The company's dedication to innovation drives the rapid growth of connected commerce on any device, and fuels the dream of a cashless future for everyone, everywhere. As the world moves from analog to digital, Visa is applying our brand, products, people, network and scale to reshape the future of commerce.

At Visa, your individuality fits right in. Working here gives you an opportunity to impact the world, invest in your career growth, and be part of an inclusive and diverse workplace. We are a global team of disruptors, trailblazers, innovators and risk-takers who are helping drive economic growth in even the most remote parts of the world, creatively moving the industry forward, and doing meaningful work that brings financial literacy and digital commerce to millions of unbanked and underserved consumers.

You're an Individual. We're the team for you. Together, let's transform the way the world pays.



Job Description

In alignment with the Vision 2030 of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Visa is delighted to offer opportunities for Cooperative Training to Saudi students! This program is designed to successfully blend academic learning with practical work experience, providing the perfect platform for students to apply theoretical knowledge in a real-world setting. It is a crucial component of our recruitment strategy and our dedication to unlocking talent in Saudi Arabia!

Joining an international industry leader such as Visa is an experience that will enrich you personally and professionally. We have designed a detailed learning journey that will aid your development and set you up for success in your career.

Opportunities available in the following 3 departments: Consulting, Business Development & Marketing. 

Visa Consulting & Analytics (VCA):

VCA is the payments consulting arm of Visa, focused on serving Visa’s clients and partners. We offer consulting and analytics services across different areas of interest to our clients including strategy, product, portfolio management, risk, digital and more.

Within VCA, we have a dedicated Data Science team who are passionate about statistics, advanced analytics and machine learning with best-in-class access to insights from VisaNet, one of the largest payment networks in the world.

Business Development (BD)

The business development team drives the country strategy and its objectives by identifying, leading, and driving, through analytics, data and market intelligence, on opportunities to drive business growth for Visa and its clients. As a BD COOP Trainee, you will provide support to the team, assisting with client requests with the purpose to grow Visa share of business.

Marketing

The team focuses on driving awareness, preference and conversion across B2B and B2C. They build the brand, with a client centric approach, by reinforcing emotional affinity via innovation and tangible proof points. This is an opportunity to use your creativity, express ideas, and make a real contribution to the organization and its mission.



Qualifications

• Must be available for a full-time COOP starting in January 2026 (2nd semester COOP only) until August 2026 (7-month program)

• Current student working towards a Bachelors degree, with a graduation date of 2026. Must be available for a full-time graduate role in August 2026

• Economics / Financial Economics, Business, Finance, IT/MIS, and Engineering disciplines welcome to apply

All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

WAAED program aims to develop fresh graduates from diverse academic backgrounds through an extensive developmental journey. The program is designed to prepare participants to become market-ready professionals across various sectors, with a special focus on the real estate industry.
 
Program Journey
WAAED program begins with a comprehensive assessment of participants’ skills, followed by a field-specific development path. The journey includes multiple learning experiences aimed at building essential knowledge, skills, and capabilities aligned with business needs and real estate sector trends. The program includes:
On-the-Job Training
Real-world exposure through hands-on experience in actual job roles within NHC and its partners.
Training Courses
Participation in specialized and advanced training courses to build both technical and soft skills.
Professional Mentorship
Ongoing support and career guidance provided by experienced industry professionals.
Hackathons
Engagement in innovation camps and collaborative challenges to solve real-life business problems.
 
Program Details
Duration: 6 months
Location: Various locations across the Kingdom (within NHC and partner organizations)
 
General Requirements
To be eligible for the WAAED program, candidates must meet the following criteria:
Saudi National
Bachelor’s or master’s degree in a relevant field
Graduated within the past 3 years
GPA of 4.0/5.0 or 3.2/4.0
Successfully pass interviews and assessments
Belong to one of the targeted academic majors
Fully available for the program and currently unemployed.
